description: Wait is a ProtoFlux node that waits for the provided Target (IPlayable) to complete playback, and then provides a continuation.

fields.* ([[Impulses|IAsyncOperation]]):
=== Target (IPlayable) ===

The IPlayable to wait for.
fields.OnWaitBegin: An async impulse that impulses when the node starts waiting.
fields.OnPlaybackFinished: Sends an impulse after the target finishes playback.
